name: config_design_analysis
short_description: This command configures general features of design analysis.
full_help:
config_design_analysis

Description: 
This command configures general features of design analysis.

Syntax: 
config_design_analysis  [-max_common_paths <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-max_common_paths]  Number of paths to consider for finding common paths 
                       across phases (< 20000)
                       Default: 1000
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Timing
